title: Dashboard Builder + Cloud Cost Security — Custom Widget & Cost Threshold Alerts
description: test_dashboard_builder.py and test_cloud_cost_security_engine.py cluster together. The dashboard builder has widget CRUD but currently only supports static data sources — widgets cannot query live engine endpoints. Cloud cost security detects >50% MoM spikes but alerts are stored rather than delivered to the configured notification channel.
missing: Live widget data source: each dashboard widget should have a data_source_url field; the builder fetches and caches the URL on dashboard load
Cost spike → Slack/PagerDuty alert: when cloud_cost_security records a >50% MoM spike, fire PagerDuty alert for cost anomalies above $10K threshold
Snapshot-based cost trending: store daily cost snapshots and expose /api/v1/cloud-cost/trend?days=30 for the executive dashboard cost chart
